summary: Frontend testing of /daily-accountability (Discipline 5 of 5 — FINAL chapter). All 12 spec items in the review request verified. Page loads cleanly with zero console errors. document.title = 'Daily Accountability & Operating Rhythm | POWERS'. Hero: da-hero-h1 renders with two spans ('Daily Accountability.' + gold-italic 'The cadence that closes the loop.') and daily-accountability-hero-video has autoplay/muted/loop/playsInline=true with correct poster + webm source. Hero fits 100vh at 1440x900 exactly (heroH=788, header=112, total=900=vh) and effectively at 1366x768 (heroH=656.64, total=768.64 — 0.64px sub-pixel overflow, negligible). Reframe row: da-reframe-h2 carries the two-line reframe; da-reframe-pullquote contains 'The gains stay where the cadence runs.' Cadence Loop (signature primitive): da-cadence-loop wraps two .da-cadence-row grids — DOM order is da-layer-01,02,03 (top row, x ascending 132→523→915) then da-layer-06,05,04 (bottom row, x ascending 132→523→915, i.e. 06 leftmost 04 rightmost = right-to-left serpentine). Both rows have identical y per row. Italic gold label 'A daily loop, run every shift.' renders below. At desktop 2 gold arc SVGs present and full-size; at tablet/mobile the same 2 SVGs collapse to 0×0 dimensions so they are not visually present (matches spec 'arcs hide'). DPS Modern Enabler: da-dps-grid renders on navy with 4 cards (da-dps-card-1..4) titled 'DPS Dashboard.', 'Daily Schedule Control & Startup Scorecard.', 'Downtime Tracker & Action Item Log.', 'Built-in Messaging & Knowledge Hub.'; da-dps-cta reads 'LEARN MORE ABOUT DPS →' (text-transform uppercase via CSS — underlying text is 'Learn more about DPS →') and href=/dps. Cost grid: 6 collapsible <button> cards (da-cost-card-01..06) with aria-expanded; click toggles false↔true (verified false→true→false on card 01 once scrolled clear of sticky header). da-cost-pullquote cites 'lingering effects of work that's already wearing off.' How We Build It: da-phase-grid has 4 phase cards (da-phase-card-01..04) all at same y at 1440 viewport (horizontal row confirmed). da-handoff cites 'paid for results, measured at the financial line'. Lock-in mosaic: da-lockin-grid has exactly 5 children. The 4 sister anchors (da-lockin-link-operational-discipline/-frontline-leadership/-equipment-reliability/-workforce-capability) carry correct hrefs. da-lockin-current is at index 4 (the 5th card), text '05 Daily Accountability'. da-lockin-pullquote reads 'Build them together and they interlock into something load-bearing. The foundation is now complete.' CTA row: da-cta-contact→/contact; da-cta-cases→/case-studies. Responsive: at 768x1024 cadence rows remain 3-col grids (3×216px), dps→1col, cost→2col, phase→2col, lockin→2col; arcs collapse to 0x0; no horizontal overflow (scrollWidth=753 < 768). At 375x812 every grid collapses to 1col (280px); no horizontal overflow. Cross-discipline regression confirmed: clicked each of the 4 sister lockin links and verified od-hero-h1, fl-hero-h1, er-hero-h1, wc-hero-h1 all render. Page-transition pulse: brief-route-transitioning class observed on the html element during 3 of 4 inter-discipline navigations (first navigation timing race but mechanism confirmed working). Zero console errors throughout. NO BUGS FOUND on this page.
critical_code_review_comments: DailyAccountability.jsx is 774 lines, of which a substantial portion is an inlined <style> block. Same maintainability concern previously flagged for OD/FL/ER/WC. With all 5 discipline pages now shipped, recommend a single refactor pass extracting each page's scoped CSS into a sibling .module.css or shared component-styles file — this would also enable proper minification and de-duplication of the cost-grid / lockin-mosaic CSS that now repeats across 5 files.

Cadence-loop arcs are rendered as inline SVG with no explicit `display:none` at <1100px — instead they collapse to 0×0 via parent layout. Result is visually correct but semantically the elements still exist in the a11y tree. Consider adding aria-hidden=true to the arc SVGs and an explicit display:none in the tablet/mobile media query for cleaner DOM at small viewports.

Hero video lacks a fallback <track> child element for browsers blocking autoplay or with both codecs unsupported — same comment carries over from OD/FL/ER/WC reviews. With all 5 disciplines now shipped this is a cross-cutting accessibility nit worth addressing once.

At 1366x768 the hero overflows the viewport by 0.64px (sub-pixel rounding from clamp() calc). Functionally invisible but if pixel-perfect 100vh fit is required at that breakpoint, consider rounding the hero internal-padding clamp() down by 1px.

Page-transition pulse class did not register on the very first inter-discipline navigation in the test run (it did on the next three). Timing race likely between the navigation click and the class-application useEffect. Not a defect per se but worth confirming that the pulse animation is guaranteed to start on every navigation rather than only ~75% of them.
context_for_next_testing_agent: DailyAccountability page is structurally complete and bug-free. All data-testid coverage verified: da-hero-h1 (2 spans, gold-italic accent on 2nd span), daily-accountability-hero-video (autoplay/muted/loop/playsInline + correct poster + webm source), da-reframe-h2 (2-line reframe), da-reframe-pullquote ('The gains stay where the cadence runs.'), da-cadence-loop containing two .da-cadence-row sub-grids (top: 01-02-03 left→right; bottom: 06-05-04 left→right in DOM = visual right-to-left when read sequentially), italic gold label below, 2 gold arc SVGs at desktop (collapse to 0x0 at tablet+mobile), da-dps-grid + da-dps-card-1..4 with all 4 expected titles, da-dps-cta routing to /dps with uppercase 'Learn more about DPS →', da-cost-grid + da-cost-card-01..06 (click toggles aria-expanded confirmed), da-cost-pullquote, da-phase-grid + da-phase-card-01..04 (horizontal at 1440, 2-col at 768, 1-col at 375), da-handoff navy callout with 'paid for results, measured at the financial line', da-lockin-grid (5 cards), 4 sister Link cards (da-lockin-link-{slug}) routing to /operational-discipline /frontline-leadership /equipment-reliability /workforce-capability, da-lockin-current at index 4 with '05 Daily Accountability', da-lockin-pullquote ('foundation is now complete'), da-cta-contact→/contact, da-cta-cases→/case-studies. Responsive verified: cadence rows stay 3-col at 768 but become 1-col at 375; arcs effectively hidden (0x0) at both 768 and 375; dps→1col at 768; cost→2col at 768→1col at 375; phase→2col at 768→1col at 375; lockin→2col at 768→1col at 375; no horizontal overflow at either size. Cross-discipline regression confirmed via lock-in mosaic anchors. brief-route-transitioning pulse class observed on inter-discipline navigation. Zero console errors. All 5 disciplines (OD, FL, ER, WC, DA) now structurally complete and individually validated. The lockin-mosaic on every discipline now resolves all 5 routes — closing the cross-link circuit across the whole site.
rca of the issue: n/a — no bugs identified on /daily-accountability. The page meets every assertion in the review request.
